title: BetterGive:Reborn
description: Make your give commands smarter, provide all registered items
body:
# This mod is a forked port of [Better Give](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-give/)

This mod adds 2 commands with the same function, only one is a bit simpler than the other:
```mcfunction
/bgive <player> <item> <count>
```
```mcfunction
/bettergive <player> <item> <count>
```

The base functionality of /bgive is the same as /give, except for one thing: the suggested autofill gets smarter, providing all registered items.
